body:
Okarin's a p
erv
Ho Owing Yo Ma

Where are you?
Contact me ASAP.
Emergency!
(empty)

The ceremonial miko dance?
But according to the legend of Ama-no-Iwato, that means... no!
Don't tell me your father intends to open the gate!?
It's too soon!

You don't need to know.
Not yet.
Eventually, if Steins Gate so chooses, you will learn the truth whether you're ready or not.

He's heard about about the IBN 5100.
As expected, it's extremely rare.
Last month, some PC otaku searched all over Akiba without finding one.
Turns out that rumor you heard was false.
El Psy Kongroo.

They didn't defile me!
They just made me wear girl's clothes ><

· In 2015, World War III breaks out
· In 2036, the world is contaminated from nuclear warfare
· You traveled from 2036 to 1975 to obtain an IBN 5100
· The IBN 5100 has a hidden function.
· Only a few of IBN's engineers knew about it.
· In 1998, you went to America to see your young self and your parents.
· You were a soldier before volunteering to become a time traveler.
· You're American.
This is how you described yourself ten years ago. Why have you changed your story?
Also, most of your predictions from back then didn't come true. If you're from the future, then why didn't your predictions come true?
I'd appreciate a satisfactory explanation.

Attachments: code picture
Do you know anything about this code?
Give me your phone number, along with any information you have on the IBN 5100.

Stop sending me all these short emails!
I'm begging you, just gather your thoughts and send everything together!

Apology accepted.
I'm looking for an IBN 5100 too.
I agree that we should exchange information.
I'll let you know when I have something.
You don't need to reply to this mail.
If you need me, call again or send an email.
It's inconsistent to say that relationships are important but you don't like relying on others.

I got the goods.
Over.

Sorry, but I'm not the owner.
I can't just give it to you.

No borrowing either.
You can come visit our lab if you want to see it, but no touching.
The address is:
Chiyoda-ku, Sotokanda 3-6-##
Ohiyama Building 2F

Kyouma, I want you
to be the Messiah.
If the same thing happens to you again, please contact me once more.
That moment will prove that you are the Messiah.

It's too late.
You have no choice but to give in...

Thanks for the intel on the IBN 5100.
The code is from SERN's database.
In other news, I've successfully built a machine that sends emails to the past.
When we change the past by sending an email, does that change the worldline?
I noticed some events were undone.
Does that mean the worldline changed?
You said many-worlds interpretation is correct, but I'd like to hear the proof, if you don't mind.

We sent an email today.
It was sent to arrive last Tuesday, 170 hours ago.
It contained the winning numbers for the third-place prize of that night's LOTO SIX drawing.
The moment we sent the email, my associates, who had helped plan the experiment and watched me send it, instantly forgot that any of that had happened.
When I checked, I found that the email had vanished from my phone's send history.
I know for a fact that it arrived in the past, as my friend bought a LOTO SIX ticket based on information I had apparently given him.
He got one of the numbers wrong, but otherwise it was an exact match.

Yes, I still have my memories from before the past was changed.
That's the truth.
By the way, this is actually the second time this has happened.
You traveled 26 years into your past.
Haven't you experienced something similar?
Also, what effect do you think my intentional manipulation of the timeline might have?

How exactly do you measure divergence?
Where do those numbers come from?

Please explain these "attractor fields."
How do they affect worldlines?

What is beyond the wall?
What will happen when we cross it?

Don't listen
to Chris pu
rsue Suzuha!

Aren't Americans supposed to be funny?
What have they been teaching you over there?

Indeed you are.
Lab Member 005, Shining Finger!
Report to the lab at once.
Reply the second you read this email.

Command sambo!?
So you are an Organization assassin!

Wait.
When did I say I wanted to eat Crunchy-kun?

We need to have an urgent meeting tomorrow, so all lab mems assemble at the lab by 1 PM.
This meeting is mandatory.
Be sure to come!

Too late?
What are you talking about?
You haven't told me anything.
This is the taste of a liar.

Then why do you keep coming back to the lab?
In truth, you're so happy to be a lab mem that you can't help it!
Isn't that right!?
You really are an @channeler.

I thought you wanted to eat "Gen-chan Ramen."
Make up your mind.

I'll teach you the Hououin Art of Cockroach Slaying.
Then you'll have nothing to fear!

Uh, nice typo.
You used the kanji for "wither."
Something tells me that's not the name her daddy gave her.
I haven't seen RaiNet, so I don't know what Kakeru-kun cosplay looks like.

Ep 8?
What are you talking about?
Don't listen to Chris pursue Suzuha!
Don't forget what Titor said.

Do you have a daughter named Suzuha?
Or do you know someone named Barrel Titor?
If you do, contact me.
She's looking for you.

Are we sharing confessions now?
Be careful to whom you expose your innermost feelings.
They may use them against you!
Goodbye

I have information on the time machine.
It's very important, so we need to talk alone.
How about the roof of Radio Kaikan at five?
You must come alone.
We can't talk otherwise.

Our lifter is the 42-inch CRT downstairs.
The electrical discharge phenomenon occurs when its turned on.
So don't worry about it.
Just finish the upgrade.

Faris and I are currently hiding above Ramen Tasaburou.
It's mostly empty with some sacks of wheat flour.
Nothing that looks useful as a weapon, and nothing big enough to hide behind.
The Viral Attackers are chasing us.
They don't seem like the type to listen to reason.
Normally I'd have no trouble taking out all of them, but I can't use my full strength with Faris nearby.
Call us a taxi, pronto.

It's Okabe!
It's urgent!
Contact me!
There's no time!

Faris!
Please pick up or email me back!

We need to talk ASAP.
It's urgent!

Where are you now?
It's Okabe.
Kyouma.
Please answer!

Faris and I are currently hiding above Ramen Tasaburou.
It's mostly empty with some sacks of wheat flour.
Nothing that looks useful as a weapon, and nothing big enough to hide behind.
The Viral Attackers are chasing us.
They don't seem like the type to listen to reason.
Normally I'd have no trouble taking out all of them, but I can't use my full strength with Faris nearby.
Call us a taxi, pronto.

This was my choice.
You don't have to worry about a thing.

Don't worry about it.
It was just something I had to do.

This was my choice.
You don't have to worry about a thing.

Sub: Haven't seen you in a while
body:
Okarin's been acting strange lately, so Mayushii didn't go to ComiMa today.
Are you at the lab?
Maybe I'll go there now.
I haven't seen you in a couple of days, you know?
We usually see each other every day, so it's really lonely ( ´• ω •` )
I know it's only been four days at most, but I'm used to being with you all the time.
I'm your hostage, remember?
Don't let go.

I don't know, but don't worry.
You don't have to worry about anything.
Model changeDo it now!!!B4 sold out!
GG01 rocks! Switch now or regret it!
Change now! Ur phone is cursed!
Do NOT go!! Not @shrine!It's a trap!

You know the coin locker in front of Daibiru?
I need you to check if the big locker in the lower-right is in use.
Please.
This is very important.

Yeah, I saw it too.
First night in a while I've had time to look at the stars.
But I don't think it was Orion.
That's a winter constellation.
Stop search. PC unneeded. Stand by.

"Cease to inquire what the future has in store, and take as a gift whatever the day brings forth." -Horace, Italian philosopher.
I'm going back to my hotel.
Do what needs to be done.
Good night.

Let me be alone.
I need to think.

I'm at ComiMa.
Let's meet up.
Where are you?

Are you in the cosplay area?
Where are you?
Please respond.

Let's hack SERN tomorrow.
Come to the lab at 11.
